race.comment: ZEMGRINDA (2) comes here after a couple of starts at Caulfield and while he was totally outclassed in the Saturday race two back, he ran a much-improved race in Wednesday grade last time out, when third beaten 3/4 of a length. Just somehow needs to overcome the wide gate but does have Linda Meech. GREATHAM BOY (1), on the other hand, draws perfectly and should be prominent throughout. Any improvement at all from the first-up run, when only narrowly beaten, will see him go close. REASONABLE POINT (6) has been mixing his form this prep but won't be wanting for fitness after four runs back and draws to get his chance. TURNAQUID (10) was only half-a-length off REASONABLE POINT three back and has won her only two starts since, so has to be considered again. TATSU (7) has changed camps after the previous connections lost patience following six seconds in a row, but he wasn't running poorly and has won a trial ahead of the return.
